use.title: How We Use Your Data
use.intro: We use collected data for the following purposes:

points.communication: To respond to enquiries and send newsletters (with your consent)
points.improvement: To improve our website and user experience
points.legal: To comply with legal obligations under EU/Maltese law

contact.content: For any privacy-related requests or questions, please contact us at:
contact.title: Contact Us

collect.title: Data We Collect
collect.intro: We may collect the following categories of personal data:

points.preferences: Property search preferences and saved listings
points.contact: Contact details provided via forms (name, email, phone)
points.technical: Technical data: IP address, browser type, pages visited (via Google Analytics 4)

controller.details:
Malta Luxury Real Estate
info@maltaluxuryrealestate.com
Malta, European Union
controller.title: Data Controller

rights.title: Your Rights (GDPR)
rights.intro: Under the General Data Protection Regulation you have the right to:

points.object: Object to or restrict processing of your data
points.erasure: Request deletion of your data (right to be forgotten)
points.access: Access the personal data we hold about you

intro.content: Malta Luxury Real Estate respects your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal data. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard information when you visit maltaluxuryrealestate.com.
intro.title: Introduction

third_party.title: Third-Party Cookies
third_party.intro: We use third-party services that may set their own cookies:

points.mapbox: Mapbox for interactive property maps (geolocation data)
points.analytics: Google Analytics 4 for anonymised usage statistics

preferences.content: You can control or delete cookies through your browser settings. Note that disabling cookies may affect the functionality of some features on this site.
preferences.title: Managing Preferences

definition.content: Cookies are small text files placed on your device when you visit a website. They help the site remember your preferences and improve your browsing experience.
definition.title: What Are Cookies?

essential.content: We use strictly necessary cookies to ensure the website functions correctly, including session management and security. These cannot be disabled.
essential.title: Essential Cookies

liability.content: All property information is provided for informational purposes only. We make no representations as to accuracy, completeness, or suitability. Malta Luxury Real Estate is not liable for any loss arising from reliance on information published.
liability.title: Limitation of Liability

law.content: These Terms are governed by the laws of Malta. Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the Maltese courts.
law.title: Governing Law

ip.content: All content on this website including text, images, logos, and design is the property of Malta Luxury Real Estate or its licensors. Reproduction without prior written permission is prohibited.
ip.title: Intellectual Property

nature.content: Malta Luxury Real Estate provides an online platform for browsing luxury real estate listings in Malta and Gozo. We act as an information intermediary and do not represent buyers or sellers in a legal capacity.
nature.title: Nature of the Service
